summary: Iter 60 — Customer-scoped Sözleşme Geçmişi inside CustomerDetailModal: FULL PASS. Frontend-only e2e validated all 13 acceptance criteria from review_request. Empty state, populated state (3 rows with badges Kapora/Teslim/Satış + car_label including year + plate + date + sale_price), 'Tümünü Gör' visibility, nested modal coexistence (no focus-trap conflict), customer-scoped ContractHistoryModal, row-click → history modal, reprint popup, delete from history modal (regression of iter59), ESC closes only top modal, customer-detail state cleanup on close. Seeded 3 contracts via API, exercised UI, then cleaned up. /api/contracts?customer_id=...&limit=5 verified in network trace; backend regression GET endpoint works.
passed_tests: CustomerDetailModal opens via dropdown 'detail-menu-<id>' on Müşteriler page
GET /api/contracts?customer_id=<id>&limit=5 fired in parallel with customersAPI.getDetail() — confirmed in network trace
Empty state shows data-testid=customer-contracts-empty with Turkish text 'Bu müşteriye ait sözleşme yok.'
Populated state (3 seeded contracts): data-testid=customer-contracts-list with 3x data-testid=customer-contract-row-<id>
Each row shows colored badge (Kapora amber / Teslim blue / Satış emerald) with correct Turkish label
Each row shows car_label 'BMW 320i (2020)' (YEAR INCLUDED — iter59 minor fix verified) + plate '34 TST 3BA' + date (15.05.2026) + sale_price (₺500.000)
When history modal is open, customer-detail-body still present in DOM (nested modal coexists — no focus-trap conflict)
ContractHistoryModal is customer-scoped: shows exactly 3 rows (the customer's contracts)
Clicking a customer-contract-row-<id> also opens ContractHistoryModal
Reprint button (regression iter59): GET /api/contracts/<id> fired and popup opened
Delete button (regression iter59): window.confirm accepted → DELETE /api/contracts/<id> → row disappears from history → sonner toast 'Sözleşme silindi'
Pressing ESC inside ContractHistoryModal closes ONLY the history modal — CustomerDetailModal remains visible (focus-trap behaves correctly)
Pressing ESC on CustomerDetailModal closes it cleanly
Reopening CustomerDetailModal on a different customer shows zero stale contract rows immediately after open (state reset in useEffect on !open path)
critical_code_review_comments: CustomerDetailModal: contracts fetch uses fire-and-forget pattern with silent error swallow — correct UX (won't block main detail view if /api/contracts is slow or fails). Verified by independent useEffect IIFE.
Cleanup: setData(null) + setContracts([]) when !open in useEffect prevents stale-state flashes between customers. Verified: 0 stale rows on reopen.

Nested modal pattern: ContractHistoryModal is rendered as SIBLING (React fragment) of the parent Dialog — NOT nested inside DialogContent. This is the correct Radix pattern to avoid duplicate focus-trap / aria conflict. Confirmed working via ESC test.

Minor (style): ContractHistoryModal could accept a 'parentOpen' callback to lift state into the parent rather than coupling onClose to setHistoryOpen(false) — current pattern works but if multiple parents reuse it the prop drilling is acceptable.

Minor (UX): The 'Tümünü Gör' link uses ChevronRight and is positioned in section header — clean. Each row also opens the full history (same callback) — both entry points have data-testid making them testable.
No accessibility issue observed: DialogTitle present, DialogDescription sr-only for history modal — passes axe semantic check at a glance.

Performance: contracts fetch with limit=5 keeps payload tiny; projection in backend already excludes base64 signatures (iter59 hardening). For customers with hundreds of contracts, the summary section is still O(5) by design.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 contracts (TEST60-001 kapora, TEST60-002 delivery, TEST60-003 sale) on customer 99b740d7-... (Test Müşteri) via direct /api/contracts POST. One row deleted via UI during delete-regression test; remaining 2 cleaned up via DELETE /api/contracts/<id> post-test. Final verification: 0 contracts remain on test customer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 60 added customer-scoped Sözleşme Geçmişi section in CustomerDetailModal (/components/modals/CustomerDetailModal.jsx). New data-testids: customer-contracts-section, customer-contracts-empty, customer-contracts-list, customer-contract-row-<id>, customer-contracts-view-all. The CustomerDetailModal is reached by clicking the kebab menu on a customer-card-<id> on Müşteriler page (sidebar data-testid=nav-customers; app uses state-based navigation NOT react-router so direct URL /musteri does NOT work — must navigate via sidebar). ContractHistoryModal is rendered as SIBLING (React fragment) of CustomerDetailModal's Dialog, accepting a 'customer' prop. Both modals coexist in DOM when history is opened (verified). ESC closes only the topmost. Seed pattern for next iter: POST /api/contracts requires contract_no (string) + type + car_id + customer_id + sale_price + (kapora optional deposit_amount). car_label is auto-built as '<brand> <model> (<year>)' on POST (iter59 minor fix).
rca of the issue: N/A — all features working as designed; zero blocking bugs; zero regressions.
